reviews.review_msg: CA 386: content of this class is easy, workload is ridiculous. The quizzes are fine, multiple choice, kinda subjective. THE ASSIGNMENTS ARE AWFUL! 3 total assignments, asking for the longest, most tedious process about old, uninteresting movies. He asks for a crazy amount of work (like 15 pages) when so unnecessary to show ur understanding.
Think he's a little shy :) Knowledgeable, helpful, extremely hard working.
Janet knows her stuff! I found her to be very helpful. I'm thankful for all of her compositional suggestions. I just wish she and David MacIntyre were on more equal footing at the college...

Dr. Macintyre is unpredictable; maybe a little moody. He gets upset sometimes when asked questions and appears to be preferential to his favorite students. He is picky rather than celebratory. Just be careful and be sure you get on his good side.
The best composition teacher, very insightful
